pages.title: Project Overview
pages.purpose: High-level introduction to Balatro Trivia: what it is, its tech stack, how to run it, and a map to all wiki sections.

pages.title: Getting Started
pages.purpose: Setup instructions: prerequisites, installing dependencies with pnpm, running the dev server, building for web, and linting/type-checking.

pages.title: Project Structure
pages.purpose: Walkthrough of the directory layout: app/, src/, assets/, hooks/, and config files. Explains the Expo Router file-based routing convention and how source code is organized.

pages.title: Application Architecture
pages.purpose: Overview of the app's runtime architecture: navigation model, global state, audio lifecycle, and orientation locking. Links to child pages for details.

pages.title: Navigation & Screen Flow
pages.purpose: Explains the single-activity navigation pattern in app/index.tsx: the Screen type, all navigation handlers, the trivia pipeline (loading → home → cards → trivia → ranking), and how screens communicate via callback props.

pages.title: Global State Management (triviaStore)
pages.purpose: Deep dive into the Zustand store in src/store/triviaStore.ts: TriviaState interface, all actions (inicializarJuego, responderPregunta, siguientePregunta, usarCarta, usarComodin, comprarItemConPuntos, intercambiarItem, cerrarTienda), ranking persistence with AsyncStorage, and the ESTADO_INICIAL reset pattern.

pages.title: Audio & Orientation Hooks
pages.purpose: Documents the custom hooks: useTriviaAudio (sound effects for correct/incorrect/end/card/joker), useBalatroOrientation (landscape lock + Android navigation bar hiding), and useFrameworkReady (web framework signal).

pages.title: Game Mechanics
pages.purpose: Overview of the trivia gameplay loop, scoring system, difficulty progression, and item system. Links to child pages for each major mechanic.

pages.title: Questions & Difficulty System
pages.purpose: Explains the Pregunta data model, the preguntas.json question bank (Balatro trivia content, difficulty levels), mezclarPreguntas/mezclarOpciones shuffle logic, buscarSiguientePregunta difficulty-matching algorithm, and the DIFICULTAD_CONFIG progression table (facil → media → dificil → imposible).

pages.title: Scoring & Streak System
pages.purpose: Documents how points are calculated: calcularPuntosBase, calcularMultiplicador (streak ≥3 bonus), aplicarEfectosCartas, procesarRespuestaCorrecta/Incorrecta, the racha/rachaDificil counters, and the chips×multiplier display in TriviaHeader.

pages.title: Cards & Jokers (Items System)
pages.purpose: Full reference for all Cartas (tarot/planeta/espectral categories) and Comodines (comun/poco_comun/raro rarities): their types, effects defined in CARTA_EFFECTS and COMODIN_EFFECTS, stacking rules, cantidadMax limits, and how marcarPrimeraCarta/marcarPrimerComodin consume them.

pages.title: The Shop
pages.purpose: Explains the mid-game Shop modal: when it appears (every TIENDA_CADA_N_PREGUNTAS=5 questions), buying items with points (COSTO_ITEM=3), the swap mechanic (5 swaps per visit), crearCartaAleatoria/crearComodinAleatorio weighted random generation, and the Shop/ShopBuyItem/ShopSwapList components.

pages.title: Screens
pages.purpose: Overview of all six application screens and their roles in the user journey. Links to child pages for each screen.

pages.title: Loading & Home Screens
pages.purpose: Documents LoadingScreen (2.5s animated progress bar, fade/spring animations, onFinish callback) and HomeScreen (logo display, animated entry, four navigation buttons, easter egg joker button unlocked after 5 subtitle taps, reset progress confirmation).

pages.title: Trivia Screen
pages.purpose: Detailed walkthrough of TriviaScreen: question rendering, OptionsGrid answer handling, inventory row layout (comodines left, cartas right), sound playback on answer, shop trigger flow, GameOverModal on game end, and the handleRespuesta → siguientePregunta lifecycle.

pages.title: Cards Explanation, Ranking & Original Jokers Screens
pages.purpose: Documents CardsExplanationScreen (pre-game item reference using CARTAS_INICIALES/COMODINES_INICIALES), RankingScreen (top-10 leaderboard from AsyncStorage, RankingItem/EmptyRankingMessage components), and OriginalJokersScreen (sprite-sheet gallery of all 160 original Balatro jokers using JokerSprite, easter-egg access).

pages.title: UI Component Library
pages.purpose: Overview of the reusable Balatro-themed UI primitives and trivia-specific components. Links to child pages for details.

pages.title: Core UI Primitives
pages.purpose: Documents BalatroButton (LinearGradient button with Balatro font, disabled state) and BalatroScreen (ImageBackground wrapper with animated GIF background, configurable dark overlay, orientation lock via useBalatroOrientation).

pages.title: Trivia-Specific Components
pages.purpose: Documents TriviaHeader (lives/Jimbo icons with shake animation, score chips×multiplier display, difficulty badge, streak pill), OptionsGrid (answer buttons with correct/incorrect color feedback, eliminated options), ItemTooltip (Balatro-style tooltip card with colored text tags, long-press modal), and ItemUseModal (confirmation dialog before consuming an item).

pages.title: Assets
pages.purpose: Overview of all static assets bundled with the app: fonts, images, and sounds. Links to child pages for each category.

pages.title: Typography: Balatro Font
pages.purpose: Documents the balatro.otf OpenType font asset: its origin (FontStruct by localthunk), SIL Open Font License terms, how it is loaded via expo-font in _layout.tsx, and where it is applied throughout the UI (fontFamily: 'Balatro').

pages.title: Image Assets
pages.purpose: Catalogs all image assets: app icon/favicon/logo, the animated background GIF, Jimbo life-indicator PNG, item card images organized by category (tarot/planet/spectral/jokers), the player sprite sheet used by JokerSprite, and the Prompts.json metadata file.

pages.title: Sound Assets
pages.purpose: Documents all audio files in assets/sounds/trivia/: background loop (loaded in _layout.tsx at volume 0.01), correct1/correct2 (streak-scaled playback), wrong, end, card, and joker sound effects. Explains how useTriviaAudio wraps expo-audio players.

pages.title: Glossary
pages.purpose: Definitions of all codebase-specific terms, Spanish identifiers, game mechanics jargon, and Balatro-domain concepts that an onboarding engineer needs to know, with code pointers.
